text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 iv 

Tips on Navigating the Codebook 

The annual demographic and eligibility (DE) T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) research file is an annual file that CMS creates 
from the monthly state enrollment data. Each annual DE file includes all Medicaid and CHIP enrollees documented as 
being enrolled in a Medicaid or CHIP program for at least one day of the year. The DE RIF
